servicesPage.title: All Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Complete solutions for every digital need. Choose the perfect service for your project.

items.q: How does the development process work?
items.a: Our process is structured in 5 phases: analysis, design, development, testing, and launch. Each phase includes revisions and approvals from you.
Times vary by service: websites 2-4 weeks, e-commerce 4-6 weeks, mobile apps 6-12 weeks. We always provide a detailed timeline.

items.q: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
items.a: Yes, we offer monthly maintenance plans that include updates, backups, security, and technical support.
We require a 30% deposit to start the project, 40% upon design presentation, and 30% upon completion. We accept bank transfer, credit card, and PayPal.

items.q: Can I modify my site after launch?
items.a: Yes, we provide a user-friendly CMS that allows you to modify content, images, and text without technical skills.

items.q: Do you also offer hosting and domain?
items.a: Yes, we offer complete packages that include optimized hosting, domain, and SSL certificate. Or we can work on your existing hosting.
